tasks.task_goal: Keep a bedroom door from closing due to drafts
tasks.expected_outcome: The door remains fixed in the open position and does not swing shut.

tasks.task_goal: Prevent a parked trailer from rolling on a sloped driveway
tasks.expected_outcome: The trailer stays stationary with its wheels immobilized.
required_tool_attributes: triangular profile to oppose wheel motion
sufficient width to contact tire tread

tasks.task_goal: Close off a residential street for a block party
tasks.expected_outcome: Vehicles are physically prevented from entering the closed street segment.
required_tool_attributes: adequate height and span to obstruct lane

tasks.task_goal: Stop cold air from seeping under an exterior door
tasks.expected_outcome: Airflow under the door is blocked, reducing drafts.
required_tool_attributes: elongated form to span door width
sufficient mass to stay in place

tasks.task_goal: Keep a dog from going upstairs
tasks.expected_outcome: The staircase entry is blocked, preventing the dog from passing.

tasks.task_goal: Fill a kitchen sink for soaking dishes
tasks.expected_outcome: Water is retained in the basin with no drain flow.
required_tool_attributes: snug, tapered fit to drain opening
structural stiffness to resist water pressure
grippable edge for placement and removal

tasks.task_goal: Keep books from sliding on an open shelf
tasks.expected_outcome: Books remain upright and do not slide along the shelf.
required_tool_attributes: sufficient height to contact book spines

tasks.task_goal: Prevent a sliding glass patio door from being opened
tasks.original_tool: sliding door security bar (dowel in track)
tasks.expected_outcome: The door cannot slide because the track is physically obstructed.
required_tool_attributes: end caps for friction and stability

tasks.task_goal: Hold tool chest drawers closed during a move
tasks.expected_outcome: Drawers remain immobilized and cannot slide open.
required_tool_attributes: compressive stiffness to resist drawer force

tasks.task_goal: Keep floodwater from entering a garage through the threshold
tasks.expected_outcome: A stable barrier forms at the doorway, reducing water ingress.

tasks.task_goal: Temporarily plug a lab flask during mixing
tasks.expected_outcome: The flask opening is sealed, blocking liquid and vapor escape.

tasks.task_goal: Prevent forklifts from entering a restricted warehouse aisle
tasks.expected_outcome: The aisle is physically blocked to vehicle access.
required_tool_attributes: sufficient height to be effective and visible

tasks.task_goal: Stop a car from overrunning a parking spot
tasks.expected_outcome: The vehicle tires contact the curb and cannot advance further.

tasks.task_goal: Block dust and overspray while painting wall trim
tasks.expected_outcome: Paint is prevented from reaching protected adjacent surfaces.
required_tool_attributes: adequate width and length to cover area
edge stiffness to maintain a straight barrier

tasks.task_goal: Childproof unused electrical outlets
tasks.expected_outcome: Outlet slots are physically blocked from object insertion.

tasks.task_goal: Block birds and rodents from entering a dryer vent
tasks.expected_outcome: Wildlife cannot pass through the vent opening while airflow remains directed.
required_tool_attributes: mesh aperture small enough to prevent entry

tasks.task_goal: Keep a rolling office chair stationary on a hard floor
tasks.expected_outcome: Chair wheels settle into cups and are prevented from rolling.
required_tool_attributes: rigid cup shape with raised edge

tasks.task_goal: Prevent a push mower from rolling while changing the blade
tasks.expected_outcome: Mower wheels are chocked and the mower remains motionless.
required_tool_attributes: angled face to oppose wheel motion
sufficient mass or grip to resist sliding

tasks.task_goal: Restrict access to a damaged stair in a public building
tasks.expected_outcome: The stairway entrance is physically blocked to pedestrians.

tasks.task_goal: Cover a laptop webcam for privacy during a video call break
tasks.expected_outcome: The camera lens is occluded, preventing image capture.
required_tool_attributes: adhesive or clip mount that stays put
smooth sliding action with positive stop
opening size sufficient to fully cover lens
